text.title: QA Risk Matrix Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of risk-matrix.yaml and the investment-plan document.

field.name: matrix.areas[].impact_rationale
field.notes: worst-case sentence with concrete customer/business effect

field.name: investment_plan.capacity_check
field.notes: total hours required vs team capacity per cycle

forbidden.pattern: all areas scored 4 or 5 on impact (flat-ratings signal; matrix has no signal)
likelihood scores set without likelihood_data backing (subjective-only)
matrix.refreshed_at older than the most recent release cycle
quadrant HH or HL has no investment plan entry OR investment plan omits the owner
area moved from HH to LL without a documented risk-acceptance sign-off
investment_plan.capacity_check shows required hours > 1.5x team capacity (plan is unrealistic; reduce LH/LL or add capacity)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Add a new area mid-cycle when a major feature ships; mark with status=new and reassess at the next refresh.
Merge two near-duplicate areas (e.g. two sub-features of billing) when they share investment patterns; preserve both names in the area's aliases list.
Round complexity_score to nearest 5 when reporting; keep precision in the underlying data.

list.item: Every impact score has a concrete worst-case rationale
Likelihood scores are data-anchored, not subjective
Investment plan present for every quadrant
Refreshed within the latest release cycle
Capacity check confirms the plan fits the team's actual hours
